name: Pipe Revenue-Based Financing API
what_it_does: Pipe revenue-based financing REST API for SaaS companies and subscription businesses to access non-dilutive growth capital by trading future recurring revenue for immediate capital with automated underwriting using ARR and MRR data connectivity. Enables AI agents to manage subscription revenue data connectivity for automated ARR-based underwriting, handle capital advance request processing for non-dilutive growth funding automation, access revenue trading and advance structure configuration for capital deployment automation, retrieve repayment tracking and revenue share monitoring for financing lifecycle automation, manage multi-product capital access (Pipe Capital, Pipe Embedded) for fintech partnership automation, handle accounting software connectivity for revenue verification automation, access credit facility management and draw scheduling for treasury automation, retrieve funding eligibility and advance limit calculation for pre-qualification automation, manage SaaS metrics connectivity (churn, expansion, NRR) for underwriting data automation, and integrate Pipe with Stripe, Recurly, Chargebee, QuickBooks, and accounting platforms for end-to-end recurring revenue financing.
use_cases: Advancing ARR from SaaS capital access agents
Embedding fintech products from Pipe partner program agents
Connecting subscription data from automated underwriting agents
Managing revenue share repayment from cash flow agents
not_for: E-commerce revenue-based financing without subscription model (use Clearco or Wayflyer)
SMB term loans and lines of credit (use OnDeck or Funding Circle)
best_when: A SaaS company or subscription business wanting AI agents to automate ARR-based non-dilutive capital access, subscription data connectivity for underwriting, and revenue share repayment management through Pipe's recurring revenue financing platform.
avoid_when: PIPE LEADERSHIP AND PRODUCT PIVOTS: Pipe has undergone multiple CEO changes and product pivots (original trading platform concept deprecated in 2022); current Pipe is focused on Pipe Capital (direct lending) and Pipe Embedded (fintech partnership); automated integrations must use current product API rather than original trading platform endpoints which may be deprecated. SUBSCRIPTION REVENUE QUALITY REQUIREMENTS: Pipe underwriting requires high-quality recurring revenue (low churn, contract-backed ARR preferred over monthly churn-risk MRR); automated pre-qualification must assess subscription revenue quality metrics; automated ARR financing for high-churn SaaS without contract commitments may receive lower advance limits or rejection. CHURN IMPACT ON ADVANCE LIMIT RECALCULATION: Pipe advance limits are calculated from ARR; significant customer churn reducing ARR triggers advance limit recalculation; automated capital planning that assumes static advance limit without monitoring ARR changes creates capital availability surprise when churn reduces facility limit.

auth.notes: Pipe uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for integrations. REST API with JSON. Miami, Florida HQ. Founded 2019 by Luke Voiles (current CEO, former Square Banking), Zain Allarakhia, and others. Backed by Shopify, HubSpot, Slack, a16z, Founders Fund ($316M+ raised). Multiple CEO changes (founders departed, Luke Voiles joined 2022 as CEO). Products: Pipe Capital (direct ARR financing), Pipe Embedded (white-label fintech capital). Revenue connectivity: Stripe, Recurly, Chargebee, QuickBooks, Xero. US operations. Competes with Capchase, Clearco, and Lighter Capital for SaaS financing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — fee on capital advanced
pricing.paid_tiers: Fee-based on capital advanced (varies by creditworthiness and ARR quality); revenue share repayment structure; Pipe Embedded: custom partner pricing
pricing.notes: Miami FL. a16z/Founders Fund backed. Fee on capital advanced. Revenue share repayment. US focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; underwriting data queries throttled; webhooks for funding and repayment events

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT ARCHITECTURE PIVOT FROM TRADING PLATFORM: Pipe originally operated as a recurring revenue trading marketplace (2019-2022); current Pipe is a direct capital provider; API documentation from before 2022 reflects deprecated trading platform architecture; automated integration must use current Pipe Capital/Embedded API documentation, not legacy trading platform docs

ARR CONNECTIVITY MULTI-PLATFORM REQUIREMENT: Pipe underwriting requires connectivity to subscription billing platform (Stripe/Recurly/Chargebee) AND accounting software (QuickBooks/Xero); automated underwriting must orchestrate multi-platform connectivity; single-platform connection without accounting system integration may result in lower advance limit or manual review requirement

ADVANCE LIMIT VS AVAILABLE DRAW DISTINCTION: Pipe provides a credit facility with total advance limit and available draw amount; automated capital access must distinguish total facility limit (ARR-based) from current available draw (facility minus outstanding advances); automated draw requests for full facility limit without accounting for outstanding balance creates overdraw error

EMBEDDED FINTECH PARTNER REVENUE SHARE MECHANICS: Pipe Embedded allows fintechs to offer Pipe capital to their customers with revenue share; embedded partner API has different authentication and revenue share tracking requirements from direct Pipe Capital API; automated embedded fintech deployment must use partner-specific API endpoints and revenue share reporting

NRR AND EXPANSION REVENUE IMPACT ON FACILITY UPDATES: Pipe may update advance limits based on ARR growth or decline; automated treasury planning must monitor Pipe facility limit changes; significant ARR growth from expansion revenue may increase available facility, creating capital access opportunity; automated capital allocation can include Pipe facility monitoring trigger
agent_readiness.security_notes: SaaS financing. FinCEN. OAuth2/API key. US. ARR, subscription, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SaaS RBF. FinCEN. OAuth2/API key. US. ARR and subscription revenue data.
